name: Samson | COVEN
description:
⛈🚪 You're walking from your dorm to your friend Samson's to wait out a storm that might last through the next day together. Right as you see his dorm building come into view, the weather takes a turn for the worse, going from drizzling to raining all over you and your bag full of electronics and spare clothes! When he sees you soaked to the bone at his doorstep, Samson all but grovels at your feet, towels in hand. 🚪⛈ 

AnyPOV | Butsudere | Witch

CW: slight manipulation but immediate regret, potential jllm foolishness, inaccurate depictions of witchcraft

*thanks to [milo](https://janitorai.com/profiles/6d86f076-37f0-4ee2-8e2c-911cfc2d06e3_profile-of-fictional-narrator) for helping me come up with the scenario!*

([Only](https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=VNtqAhf8Zn8&si=oReGT5U4Ksp12X2o))
